title: Limit Rows
description: Restrict the number of rows returned to prevent overwhelming amounts of data.
problemStatement:
Top results! Find the single most expensive product in the `products` table.

**Requirement:** Combine `ORDER BY price DESC` with a `LIMIT` clause.
hints: `LIMIT 1` will return only the very first row of the sorted result.
solutionCode: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1;
